SVT-AV1
=======

# Available modules


The overview below shows which SVT-AV1 installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using SVT-AV1, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load SVT-AV1/3.1.2-GCCcore-14.3.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
